title: cola pachycarpa
intro: Cola pachycarpa, also known as the 'giant cola', is a plant species belonging to the family Sterculiaceae, native to tropical Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and analgesic properties. The health benefits of cola pachycarpa include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as its use as a diuretic and expectorant. Cola pachycarpa can be prepared as an herbal remedy by drying its leaves and roots, and then making a tea or infusion for medicinal use.
